widgets.title: Running Pods
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*) FROM K8sPodSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' AND phase = 'Running'

widgets.title: Pod Status Distribution
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*) FROM K8sPodSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' FACET phase

widgets.title: Pod Restarts
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT sum(kubernetes.pod.restartCount) FROM K8sPodSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: CPU Usage by Pod
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(cpuPercent) FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' FACET podName TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Memory Usage by Pod
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(memoryUsedPercent) FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' FACET podName TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Network Traffic
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(networkRxBytesPerSecond), average(networkTxBytesPerSecond) FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: File System Usage
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(fsUsedPercent) FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Node Status
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*) FROM K8sNodeSample FACET nodeName, status

widgets.title: Cluster Resource Usage
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(cpuPercent), average(memoryUsedPercent) FROM K8sClusterSample TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Deployment Events
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT * FROM K8sEventSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
